targets.query: WITH top_edges AS (SELECT wallet_a, wallet_b, common_tokens, similarity_score FROM graph.wallet_similarity_edges FINAL ORDER BY similarity_score DESC LIMIT 120), wallets AS (SELECT wallet_a AS wallet FROM top_edges UNION DISTINCT SELECT wallet_b AS wallet FROM top_edges), degrees AS (SELECT wallet, count() AS degree, round(max(score), 2) AS best_score FROM (SELECT wallet_a AS wallet, similarity_score AS score FROM top_edges UNION ALL SELECT wallet_b AS wallet, similarity_score AS score FROM top_edges) GROUP BY wallet) SELECT wallet AS id, concat(substring(wallet, 1, 6), '...', substring(wallet, -4)) AS title, concat('degree ', toString(degree)) AS subTitle, best_score AS mainStat FROM wallets LEFT JOIN degrees USING (wallet) ORDER BY best_score DESC

SELECT concat(wallet_a, '-', wallet_b) AS id, wallet_a AS source, wallet_b AS target, round(similarity_score, 2) AS mainStat, common_tokens AS secondaryStat, round(jaccard_tokens, 3) AS detail__jaccard, round(time_correlation, 3) AS detail__time_corr FROM graph.wallet_similarity_edges FINAL ORDER BY similarity_score DESC LIMIT 120

SELECT wallet_a, wallet_b, common_tokens, round(jaccard_tokens, 3) AS jaccard_tokens, round(time_correlation, 3) AS time_correlation, round(similarity_score, 2) AS similarity_score, calculated_at FROM graph.wallet_similarity_edges FINAL ORDER BY similarity_score DESC LIMIT 30

WITH (SELECT wallet_a FROM graph.wallet_similarity_edges FINAL ORDER BY similarity_score DESC LIMIT 1) AS seed_wallet SELECT seed_wallet, if(wallet_a = seed_wallet, wallet_b, wallet_a) AS neighbor_wallet, common_tokens, round(jaccard_tokens, 3) AS jaccard_tokens, round(time_correlation, 3) AS time_correlation, round(similarity_score, 2) AS similarity_score FROM graph.wallet_similarity_edges FINAL WHERE wallet_a = seed_wallet OR wallet_b = seed_wallet ORDER BY similarity_score DESC LIMIT 30

WITH (SELECT wallet_a FROM graph.wallet_similarity_edges FINAL ORDER BY similarity_score DESC LIMIT 1) AS a, (SELECT wallet_b FROM graph.wallet_similarity_edges FINAL ORDER BY similarity_score DESC LIMIT 1) AS b SELECT e1.token_address, e1.volume_usd AS wallet_a_volume_usd, e2.volume_usd AS wallet_b_volume_usd, e1.tx_count AS wallet_a_tx_count, e2.tx_count AS wallet_b_tx_count, e1.last_seen AS wallet_a_last_seen, e2.last_seen AS wallet_b_last_seen FROM graph.v_wallet_token_edges AS e1 JOIN graph.v_wallet_token_edges AS e2 USING (token_address) WHERE e1.wallet_address = a AND e2.wallet_address = b ORDER BY least(e1.volume_usd, e2.volume_usd) DESC LIMIT 30

panels.title: Why The Top Wallet Pair Is Similar

targets.query: WITH edges AS (SELECT from_token, to_token, edge_weight, support_wallets FROM graph.token_transition_edges FINAL ORDER BY edge_weight DESC LIMIT 80), tokens AS (SELECT from_token AS token FROM edges UNION DISTINCT SELECT to_token AS token FROM edges), degrees AS (SELECT token, count() AS degree, round(max(weight), 2) AS best_weight FROM (SELECT from_token AS token, edge_weight AS weight FROM edges UNION ALL SELECT to_token AS token, edge_weight AS weight FROM edges) GROUP BY token) SELECT token AS id, dictGet('mart.tokens_dict', 'symbol', token) AS title, concat('degree ', toString(degree)) AS subTitle, best_weight AS mainStat FROM tokens LEFT JOIN degrees USING (token) ORDER BY best_weight DESC

SELECT concat(from_token, '-', to_token) AS id, from_token AS source, to_token AS target, round(edge_weight, 2) AS mainStat, transition_count AS secondaryStat, round(avg_return_proxy, 3) AS detail__return_proxy, round(confidence, 3) AS detail__confidence, support_wallets AS detail__support_wallets FROM graph.token_transition_edges FINAL ORDER BY edge_weight DESC LIMIT 80

SELECT tree_rank, dictGet('mart.tokens_dict', 'symbol', from_token) AS from_symbol, dictGet('mart.tokens_dict', 'symbol', to_token) AS to_symbol, support_wallets, transition_count, round(edge_weight, 2) AS edge_weight FROM graph.token_spanning_tree_edges FINAL ORDER BY tree_rank LIMIT 30

SELECT route_rank, arrayStringConcat(path_symbols, ' -> ') AS route, hops, round(expected_return_proxy, 3) AS expected_return_proxy, round(confidence, 3) AS confidence, round(route_weight, 2) AS route_weight, support_wallets FROM graph.token_route_recommendations FINAL ORDER BY route_rank LIMIT 30
